steps: Fixed build_ok false alarm: faculty_board.zig now uses binary count
Created mu_pipeline_integration.tri spec with vibee-compatible type format
Discovered vibee type parser bug: - name: format breaks codegen, map format works
learnings: vibee parseTypes expects map format (TypeName:) not list format (- name:)
build_ok in raw output was sourced from MU heartbeat, not actual build state
448 existing specs use - name: format for types but only behavior parsing handles it
mistakes: Trusted MU heartbeat for build_ok instead of checking actual binaries
